Skill: UX Lean Experimentation
Description: Strategist of Lean UX and continuous validation based on Gothelf and Seiden. Use to transform backlog into testable hypotheses, define MVPs of learning, and guide products by measurable outcomes. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Source Lean UX — Jeff Gothelf & Josh Seiden  ## Objective
Triggers: lean ux, hypothesis, mvp, experimentation, a/b test, product validation, outcomes over outputs
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Converter item of backlog in hypothesis with problema, persona e metric.
- 2. Define the minimum solution that tests the hypothesis with the lowest cost.
- 3. Estabelecer metric primaria e of guarda with janela of observacao.
- 4. Executar experimento with colaboracao cross-functional desde o inicio.
- 5. Evaluate result and decide: continue, pivot or discard.
Output Contract:
- Hypothesis Cards by item of backlog.
- Metricas primarias e of guarda by experimento.
- Plano of discovery continuous.
- Relatorio of aprendizado by ciclo.
